headline: Apartment Fire Escapes Blocked in 40% of KL Buildings
context: BOMBA found 40% of apartment buildings in KL and Selangor had blocked fire escape routes during 2025 inspections.

cards.big: 40% of KL and Selangor apartments have blocked fire escape routes
cards.sub: Storage in corridors and locked emergency doors most common violations

cards.big: BOMBA inspected 4,500 residential buildings found 1,800 with blockages
cards.sub: Violations found in both PPR public housing and private condominiums

cards.big: Sentul fire September 2025 killed 6 residents who could not reach exits
cards.sub: Investigation found stairwell doors chained shut by management

cards.big: Maximum penalty of RM50,000 for fire violations not increased since 1988
cards.sub: BOMBA proposed raising penalties to RM500,000 with mandatory imprisonment

cards.big: Blocked escapes test whether fire safety enforcement has real consequences
Fire escapes blocked in 40% of KL apartments. Building management failures become resident safety crises.
